snippet.title: Od naknade s biroa kupili ovce
snippet.description:
Nermin i Amina ≈†emiƒЗ iz Kaknja uspjeli su od naknade za nezaposlene koje su dobili s biroa zapo≈°ljavanja u≈°tedjeti novac i kupiti ovce. Danas imaju mini farmu romanovskih ovaca i ≈Њive na selu. Ka≈Њe ovaj braƒНni par da je puno lak≈°e i ljep≈°e ≈Њivjeti na selu nego u gradu. Svoju buduƒЗnost vide u ovƒНarstvu jer u selu ZlokuƒЗe ima samo ≈°est kuƒЗa iz kojih se dimi. Priroda je besprijekorno ƒНista a trave ima u izobilju. Nermin se odliƒНno snalazi s ovcama i ove godine udvostruƒНit ƒЗe svoje stado. InaƒНe sve vi≈°e se ljudi vraƒЗa u ZlokuƒЗe  gdje grade vikendice i dr≈Њe stoku. Ovo selo je 2000 godine potpuno uni≈°tilo klizi≈°te. Vlast je ljude naselila u blizini Kaknja gdje im je pomogla izgraditi nove kuƒЗe. Primjer mladih stoƒНara je vrijedan pa≈Њnje.

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

WIIP: https://wiip.rs

Pavlezi: https://www.instagram.com/pavlezi.mp3/

GLE.TV Production

http://gledaj.rsвАЛ

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz, Arpino Sachi
Back vocal: Ma≈°a Sitarica

Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвАЛвАЛ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-вАЛвАЛ...

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвАЛвАЛ...

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвАЛвАЛ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramвАЛвАЛ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвАЛвАЛ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвАЛвАЛ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвАЛвАЛ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвАЛвАЛ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвАЛ #FutureNostalgiaвАЛ #Grammys

Nakon izlaska iz zatvora nastavlja i pojaƒНava disidentsku retoriku i poziva Srbe da se vrate sebi i odbace titoizam. Dr≈Њao je predavanja u SAD, gde je govorio srpskoj emigraciji. MomƒНilo ƒРujiƒЗ ga je proglasio ƒНetniƒНkim vojvodom. Pozivao je izme≈°tanje Brozovog groba iz Beograda. PoƒНetkom raspada Jugoslavije pozivao je Srbe na borbu i stvaranje Velike Srbije. Slao je dobrovoljce na front i obilazio polo≈Њaje srpskih snaga. U Srbiji je bio opozicija re≈Њimu Slobodana Milo≈°eviƒЗa, ali kako je sam govorio, uvek konstruktivna. U toku politiƒНkog delovanja upoznao je i dosta ljudi s one strane zakona, a s nekima poput Arkana i Gi≈°ke ulazio je u otvoreni sukob, na ivici fiziƒНkog. Komentarisao je kriminalne obraƒНune devedesetih, ƒНesto iznoseƒЗi u javnost ekskluzivne informacije o sluƒНajevima, navodeƒЗi da ih dobija od "Laufera". Tokom agresije 1999. godine bio je potpredsednik Vlade, ali i veliki protivnik Kumanovskog sporazuma, apelujuƒЗi da je trebalo istrajati du≈Њe u otporu agresoru. Nakon petoktobarskih promena o kojima govori da su bili istorijska gre≈°ka srpskog naroda bio je opozicija re≈Њimu i veliki kritizer vlade Zorana ƒРinƒСiƒЗa. Sam je priznao da je imao kontakt i sa voƒСama Zemunskog klana. Nakon objavljivanja optu≈Њnice Ha≈°kog tribunala protiv njega odluƒНio je da tamo i ode najavljujuƒЗi krvavo proleƒЗe u Srbiji. Ubrzo nakon toga je likvidiran premijer ƒРinƒСiƒЗ. U toku njegovog procesa u Hagu njegova stranka se podelila i deo ƒНlanstva na ƒНelu s Tomislavom NikoliƒЗem i Aleksandrom VuƒНiƒЗem osnovao je Srpsku naprednu stranku. Iz Ha≈°kog tribunala je kako ka≈Њe izbaƒНen, jer nisu znali ≈°ta vi≈°e da rade sa njim. Napisao je veƒЗi broj knjiga, od "Ideologije srpskog nacionalizma" do mnogih knjiga beskompromisnih naslova kojima kritikuje konkretne liƒНnosti. Iz politiƒНke biografije izdvaja se i sledeƒЗe: ƒНetiri puta je bio kandidat za predsednika Republike Srbije. Obavljao je du≈Њnost potpredsednika Vlade Republike Srbije, a u periodu od 1996. do 1998. bio je predsednik op≈°tine Zemun. PreporuƒНujemo da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate vi≈°e o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 05.03.2021. godine u prostorijama Srpske radikalne stranke, u Zemunu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar PavkoviƒЗ.

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
MusicвАЩs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhen√© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, s√§je, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); s√§je for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.

Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

prenecu kofer i dobija≈° ket

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryвАЩs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines wonвАЩt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

Connect with The National online:
Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/thenational
Twitter | https://twitter.com/CBCTheNational
Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/cbcthenational

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.
